name: Home Federal Bancorp, Inc. of Louisiana
business: Home Federal Bancorp, Inc. of Louisiana is the holding company for Home Federal Bank, a federally chartered stock savings bank that attracts deposits from the general public and originates loans primarily in northwest Louisiana.
sellsTo: commercial customers in Caddo, Bossier, and Webster Parishes, Louisiana

exposures.sentence: Historically, our principal lending activity was the origination of one-to-four family residential loans.
We have introduced mobile and Internet banking and remote deposit capture, to better serve our commercial clients.
